titles.ar: باب أَنَّ النِّسَاءَ يُصَدَّقْنَ فِي الْعِدَّةِ وَ الْحَيْضِ
titles.en: Chapter 34 – The women are ratified with regards to the waiting period and the menstruation

titles.ar: باب أَنَّ النِّسَاءَ يُصَدَّقْنَ فِي الْعِدَّةِ وَ الْحَيْضِ
titles.en: Chapter 34 – The women are ratified with regards to the waiting period and the menstruation

segments: الْعِدَّةُ وَ الْحَيْضُ لِلنِّسَاءِ إِذَا ادَّعَتْ صُدِّقَتْ .
arabic.text: الْعِدَّةُ وَ الْحَيْضُ لِلنِّسَاءِ إِذَا ادَّعَتْ صُدِّقَتْ .

segments: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Jameel, from Zurara,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The waiting period, and the menstruation are for the women; when they claim, they would be ratified’.
en.hubeali.text:
Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Jameel, from Zurara,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The waiting period, and the menstruation are for the women; when they claim, they would be ratified’.

segments: 1. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Jamil from Zurarah who has said the following: “Abu Ja‘far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Waiting period and Hayd (menses) are for women. If they say something about it their words are accepted.”’
en.sarwar.text: 1. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Jamil from Zurarah who has said the following: “Abu Ja‘far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Waiting period and Hayd (menses) are for women. If they say something about it their words are accepted.”’

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/171)
gradings.label: حسن
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (1/171)

narratorChain.raw: عَلِيُّ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِي عُمَيْرٍ عَنْ جَمِيلٍ عَنْ زُرَارَةَ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ
